title: Department Manager Vacancy at Easyday - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Easyday - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Easyday! We are hiring a Department Manager for our Agra team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Easyday:
Easyday is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Easyday!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
